member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Idsk.PrimeIdskTestMethod
member.summary: Test Method for Intra Die Statistical Kill (IDSK).

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Idsk.PrimeIdskTestMethod.#ctor(Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService,Prime.ConsoleService.IConsoleService,Prime.SharedStorageService.ISharedStorageService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Idsk.PrimeIdskTestMethod.BitLogicType
member.summary: Enum for acceptable bitlogic used in outlier detection.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idsk.PrimeIdskTestMethod.VminInput
member.summary: Gets or sets Incoming VMIN string.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idsk.PrimeIdskTestMethod.OutlierVector
member.summary: Gets or sets Outgoing tracking structure GSDS to be used later by DieRecovery.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idsk.PrimeIdskTestMethod.BitLogic
member.summary: Gets or sets Kill for zscore AND/OR vmin_delta. AND by default.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idsk.PrimeIdskTestMethod.StdDevFloor
member.summary: Gets or sets Minimum standard deviation allowed.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idsk.PrimeIdskTestMethod.StdDevCeiling
member.summary: Gets or sets Maximum standard deviation allowed.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idsk.PrimeIdskTestMethod.ZscoreLimit
member.summary: Gets or sets Sigma kill limit.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Idsk.PrimeIdskTestMethod.VminDelta
member.summary: Gets or sets Maximum vmin difference allowed.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Idsk.PrimeIdskTestMethod.SplitInputStingToArray
member.summary: Split GSDS string with vmin values into an Array of doubles.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Idsk.PrimeIdskTestMethod.GetValidVminValues(System.Double[])
member.param: Raw array wiht vmin values form GSDS.
member.returns: List with all vmin invalid values removed.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Idsk.PrimeIdskTestMethod.CalculateVminStandardDeviation(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Double},System.Double)
member.param: Mean value for valid array values.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Idsk.PrimeIdskTestMethod.AdjustStandardDeviation(System.Double)
member.summary: Adjust standard deviation based on users values.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Idsk.PrimeIdskTestMethod.WriteToItuff(System.Double[],System.String)
member.summary: Write to ituff with needed information.
